headline: A compact command center for the Royals season

latest_prospect_update.name: Blake Mitchell
latest_prospect_update.note: Most obvious remaining minor-league prospect to track; catcher development and power/patience are the main signals. Recent line: .179 / .233 / .286.

nightly_recap: The Royals lost to the Philadelphia Phillies, KC 1, PHI 6. Michael Wacha led the night, working 6.0 innings with 4 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 1 walk. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 108.8 mph.

player_of_game.name: Michael Wacha
player_of_game.reason: worked 6.0 innings with 4 earned runs, 7 strikeouts and 1 walk.
